3181980.name: DRAGONOID
3181980.description:
🥚 DRAGONOID
A Classic Turn-Based RPG Adventure

🥋 Protagonist: GAI
A cheerful young boy with a heart full of wonder and a smile as wide as the sunrise. Orphaned at a young age but never hardened by the world . Though small in stature, GAI possesses a spirit as boundless as the skies above

🧘‍♂️ Why a Monk?
GAI believes true strength lies not in might, but in mastering oneself. His journey is not just through forests and dungeons, but through his own doubts, fears, and the ancient teachings left behind

🌍 Setting: Fantasy

A child dreams in a language no one has taught them. A ruin is found where the walls breathe. A sword sings a lullaby when drawn. These are Echoes—fragments of the forgotten time. The world is trying to remember itself… and something else is remembering too.
